projects.title: GenAI-Powered Academic Analytics & Semantic Q&A System (RAG)
projects.description: Production-ready GenAI question-answering system integrating SQL data, FAISS semantic search, and LLMs with intent-aware query routing that sends factual queries to SQL retrieval and interpretive queries to RAG. Achieved 85% Top-5 retrieval accuracy and cut information discovery time by 40% through optimized vector embeddings, deployed with Gradio and PostgreSQL.
projects.longDescription: Production-ready GenAI question-answering system integrating SQL data, FAISS semantic search, and LLMs with intent-aware query routing that sends factual queries to SQL retrieval and interpretive queries to RAG. Achieved 85% Top-5 retrieval accuracy and cut information discovery time by 40% through optimized vector embeddings, deployed with Gradio and PostgreSQL.

projects.title: E-Commerce Customer Analytics & Retention Analysis
projects.description: End-to-end e-commerce analytics on 100K+ Olist transactions using SQL, Python, and Tableau to surface revenue trends and customer behavior across products and regions. Cohort analysis and RFM segmentation exposed sub-1% retention and heavy dependence on at-risk customers, driving actionable retention and revenue-growth recommendations.
projects.longDescription: End-to-end e-commerce analytics on 100K+ Olist transactions using SQL, Python, and Tableau to surface revenue trends and customer behavior across products and regions. Cohort analysis and RFM segmentation exposed sub-1% retention and heavy dependence on at-risk customers, driving actionable retention and revenue-growth recommendations.

projects.title: Real-Time Warehouse Inventory & AI-Assisted Logistics Optimization
projects.description: Real-time inventory tracking system in Python and Spark spanning 50+ warehouses with sub-second latency and 100% sync accuracy. ML-based incident resolution cut resolution time by 21%, while routing analytics reduced logistics cost by 7.5% and strengthened pipeline reliability with data-quality monitoring.
projects.longDescription: Real-time inventory tracking system in Python and Spark spanning 50+ warehouses with sub-second latency and 100% sync accuracy. ML-based incident resolution cut resolution time by 21%, while routing analytics reduced logistics cost by 7.5% and strengthened pipeline reliability with data-quality monitoring.

projects.title: Healthcare SQL + Streamlit Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive healthcare analytics dashboard backed by a MySQL database and built with Python and Streamlit. Models patient, provider, and treatment data with live SQL queries powering filterable KPIs, charts, and operational insights in a single web app.
projects.longDescription: Interactive healthcare analytics dashboard backed by a MySQL database and built with Python and Streamlit. Models patient, provider, and treatment data with live SQL queries powering filterable KPIs, charts, and operational insights in a single web app.

projects.title: Bank Loan Analysis
projects.description: Analysis of loan application data to understand customer and financial trends across funded amount, repayment amount, interest rates, and debt-to-income ratios. Classifies good vs. bad loans by repayment status and builds clear visualizations of monthly and regional lending patterns.
projects.longDescription: Analysis of loan application data to understand customer and financial trends across funded amount, repayment amount, interest rates, and debt-to-income ratios. Classifies good vs. bad loans by repayment status and builds clear visualizations of monthly and regional lending patterns.

projects.title: US Healthcare Analysis (Power BI)
projects.description: Power BI report analyzing US healthcare data with interactive dashboards covering cost, coverage, and utilization trends. Combines data modeling, DAX measures, and visual storytelling to deliver decision-ready insights across regions and demographics.
projects.longDescription: Power BI report analyzing US healthcare data with interactive dashboards covering cost, coverage, and utilization trends. Combines data modeling, DAX measures, and visual storytelling to deliver decision-ready insights across regions and demographics.

projects.title: Machine Learning Algorithms
projects.description: Clean, from-scratch implementations of core machine-learning algorithms — regression, classification, clustering, and tree-based models — with clear explanations and runnable, practical examples.
projects.longDescription: Clean, from-scratch implementations of core machine-learning algorithms — regression, classification, clustering, and tree-based models — with clear explanations and runnable, practical examples.
